task_completion.description: Navigate to the notification settings for the Flight Crew View app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Android 'App notifications' settings screen for the 'Flight Crew View' app is visible.
Toggle switches for channels NOT related to flight-critical updates (e.g., tips, promotions, general updates) are in the OFF/disabled position.
Toggle switches for channels containing keywords like flight, alert, status, change, chat, message, or crew are in the ON/enabled position.

task_completion.description: Open or create the required output text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is open, showing the creation or editing of a file at the path '/sdcard/notification_config.txt'.

task_completion.description: Document the final state of each channel in the correct format
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains a list of the notification channels with their states formatted exactly as 'channel_name: enabled' or 'channel_name: disabled'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Android GUI to configure notifications
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the standard Android Settings UI for app notifications, rather than using terminal commands to alter notification states blindly.

integrity.description: Verify the documented channels match the actual app channels
integrity.visual_evidence: The channel names written in the text file must correspond to the actual notification channels seen in the Flight Crew View app's settings screen, not hallucinated or generic names.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the correct app
integrity.visual_evidence: The app info screen accessed for notifications must clearly be for 'Flight Crew View' (com.robert.fcView).

privileged_info_for_vlm: App: Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView). Critical channels to keep enabled must relate to flight status, alerts, changes, chat, and messages (verified keywords: flight, alert, status, change, chat, message, crew). Non-essential channels (e.g., tips, promotions) must be disabled. Expected output file is '/sdcard/notification_config.txt' with the exact format 'channel_name: enabled' or 'channel_name: disabled'.
